title: Webusayiti ya IATF
summary: Webusayiti ya International Accessibility Task Force.
problem: Wupu wa IATF ukakhumbikwiranga malo ghakukhazikika agho ghangaŵalongosolera makora ŵanthu ivyo ŵakughanaghana, kulemba ndondomeko ya ivyo ŵakukhumba, na kuŵawovwira kuti ŵamanye nthowa yiwemi yakulondezgapo.
why: Webusayiti iyi ni mulyango wakunjilira ku IATF. Yili kupangika nga ni polojekiti yichoko kuti yiŵe yipusu kuŵazga, kung'anamura, na kusungilira.
scopeIn: Ma landing page agho ghakulongosora umo IATF yikugwilira ntchito
Ndondomeko ya IATF iyo yikovwira ŵanthu kuti ŵamanye ivyo vikuchitika, awo ŵakuchita mulimo uwu, na awo ŵakugwirako ntchito.
Static deployment pa Cloudflare Workers Static Assets
scopeOut: Vigaŵa vya mamembara, maakaunti, panji umo ŵanthu ŵakugwilira ntchito
Kusunga code ya project, iyo yikukhala mu repository ya project yiliyose
Kuyowoyeskana kwa nyengo yeneyiyo, uko kukusangika mu Discord
Kuwunika nkhani za projekiti yimoza, iyo yikukhala mu GitHub repository ya projekiti yiliyose

title: IATF selfie
summary: Chinthu chinyake icho IATF yikagwiliskira ntchito, chikalembeka pamanyuma pakuti yafika pa malo apo yikwimilira.
problem: Kufufuza koyambirira kwa chida chomwe chimayang'ana kupezeka pansi pa ambulera ya IATF.
why: Buku ili likusungikira ŵanthu wose, nangauli ntchito yakung'anamura Baibolo ili yamara.
scopeIn: Chitsanzo choyambirira cha chida chopezera anthu mwayi chosungidwa monga mbiri ya anthu onse

title: IATF bot
summary: IATF community bot, archived after reaching a natural stopping point.
why: Buku ili likusungikira ŵanthu wose, nangauli ntchito yakung'anamura Baibolo ili yamara.
scopeIn: IATF community channels, kusungidwa ngati mbiri ya anthu onse
